bank_accounts.description: List of [bank account](/api-reference/bank-accounts) IDs to be included in the report.

from_date.description:
Restrict report to data from on or after this datetime ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)).

- `VOAI` reports - controls the length of asset history
- `VOA` reports - controls the length of asset history
- `VOI` reports - controls the length of income history

income_from_date.description:
Restrict report to data from on or after this datetime ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)).

- `VOAI` reports - controls the length of income history
- Does not apply to `VOA` or `VOI` reports.

income_stream_confidence_minimum.description:
Limit income streams used in the report to those above this confidence value (`0-100` accepted).

Only available for `VOI` and `VOAI` report types.

report_custom_fields.description: Include up to `5` custom objects in the report metadata. Often used for identifying information.
